title: CXXRTL: (* top *) attribute causes wildcard port connections (.*) to break

features.name: top attribute with wildcard port connection
features.description: Code should include a module marked with the (* top *) synthesis attribute that uses wildcard port connections (.*) to instantiate a submodule with output ports

features.name: wildcard port connection to output port
features.description: Code should include a submodule instantiation using wildcard port connections where the submodule has output ports that should be connected to parent signals
